qa_pairs.question: Where can I find a list of systems available for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) and instructions on how to request resources?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find a list of systems available for this competition and understand how resources must be requested in the online form by visiting the "Available Resources" page.

qa_pairs.question: If I require 180 core-years and 50 TB of project storage on the Fir cluster, what should I include in my RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: If you need 180 core-years (or core-equivalent-years) and 50 TB of project storage on Fir, your RAC application should only request 50 TB of storage on that cluster.

qa_pairs.question: Why should CPU not be requested in a RAC application if 180 core-years and 50 TB of project storage are needed on the Fir cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: You should not request CPU in your application in this scenario as you may be able to obtain the CPU you need without a RAC allocation.
